name: SCYNEXIS INC
business: SCYNEXIS is dedicated to advancing innovative solutions for severe rare diseases, with its lead program in the treatment and prevention of difficult-to-treat and drug-resistant fungal infections. The company is developing its proprietary antifungal platform 'fungerps', a novel class of antifungal agents called triterpenoids. Ibrexafungerp, the first representative, is approved as BREXAFEMME for vulvovaginal candidiasis and recurrent vulvovaginal candidiasis, and is licensed to GSK.

exposures.sentence: SCYNEXIS, Inc. is dedicated to advancing innovative solutions for severe rare diseases, with our lead program in the treatment and prevention of difficult-to-treat and drug-resistant fungal infections.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 1 study with intravenous formulation of SCY-247
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated a Phase 1 study with the intravenous formulation of SCY-247 in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 study of SCY-247 in invasive candidiasis
catalysts.sentence: The clinical proof-of-concept Phase 2 study of SCY-247 is currently planned for 2026 in patients with IC.

catalysts.event: GSK initiate regulatory interactions with FDA for BREXAFEMME relaunch
catalysts.sentence: GSK anticipates being able to initiate regulatory interactions with the FDA in 2026 to discuss the relaunch of BREXAFEMME for VVC and rVVC in the U.S. market.
